title: goodenia anfracta
intro: Goodenia anfracta is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the family Goodeniaceae. It has been traditionally used in Australian indigenous medicine, and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. In herbal preparations, Goodenia anfracta is often used as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can be used in remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
